title: Leaves Upgraded
description: A resource pack that changes tree and mushroom models and textures
body: A resource pack that changes the block models of tree leaves and mushrooms. Trees in Minecraft will now look more natural and birch leaves will now look golden yellow. Leaves will look cooler and more realistic. Check out a birch forest with this resource pack. Fully compatable with other resource packs and mods.![A birch forest hill.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f5806173b18c6f0070fe4568e95a826582e24ef_0.webp)![The end of the day in a pale garden.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/081ec957f2c954f5feead3012fa72f66790ee1ac_0.webp)![New stuff.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3630d8c4e065f33b83e790ac36e4172cbc285eb6_0.webp)![A roofed forest by a river a t night.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e422d1009e8f19fa76b617117e0db189bf754b6_0.webp)![Climbing trees in a jungle.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27a5d10c9e2b42cb6db2fa3494d7005d5e6b3ff8_0.webp)
